prompt: Using the data from the provided line graph showing stock market fluctuations, generate a flat design style infographics, where the peaks and valleys correspond to the data points. Add the text 'Stock Market Fluctuations' to the top of the image.
prompt_refined: Generate a flat design style infographic. Incorporate the stock market fluctuation data from image 1 such that the infographic's visual elements accurately reflect the peaks and valleys of the line graph. Position the text 'Stock Market Fluctuations' at the top of the generated image.
objects: Text 'Stock Market Fluctuations' at the top
Primary visual element depicting the stock market trend, mimicking the peaks and valleys of the line graph from Image 1
Labels for time periods (e.g., months like Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, Feb, Mar)
Labels for stock value ranges (e.g., numerical indicators from 2475 to 2875)
Simplified graphical elements or icons related to finance or data visualization in flat design style
Geometric shapes and clean lines as part of the overall flat design aesthetic
Minimalist typography for all text elements
